ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peripheral_instances" (
  "instance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each peripheral instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the peripheral instance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the peripheral instance */,
  "mcu_type" TEXT /* Type of microcontroller unit (MCU) the peripheral instance is associated with */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the peripheral */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the peripheral */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the peripheral */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the peripheral */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peripheral_pins" (
  "pin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each peripheral pin */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the peripheral pin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the peripheral pin */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of pin (e.g., input, output, bidirectional) */,
  "voltage_range" TEXT /* Voltage range the pin can handle */,
  "current_limit" TEXT /* Current limit for the pin */,
  "pin_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the pin (input, output) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pio_ports" (
  "pio_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each PIO port */,
  "pio_name" TEXT /* Name of the PIO port */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PIO port */,
  "port_type" TEXT /* Type of port (e.g., GPIO, SPI, I2C) */,
  "port_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the port (input, output, bidirectional) */,
  "num_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines in the port */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the port was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the port was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pio_lines" (
  "line_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each PIO line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the PIO line */,
  "pio_id" TEXT /* Reference to the PIO port the line belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PIO line */,
  "line_type" TEXT /* Type of line (e.g., data, clock, control) */,
  "line_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the line (input, output, bidirectional) */,
  "default_state" TEXT /* Default state of the line (high, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peripheral_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "instance_id" TEXT /* Reference to the peripheral instance */,
  "pin_id" TEXT /* Reference to the peripheral pin */,
  "pio_id" TEXT /* Reference to the PIO port */,
  "line_id" TEXT /* Reference to the PIO line */,
  "peripheral_peripheral" TEXT /* Peripheral peripheral (e.g., B, C, A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the configuration belongs to */,
  "configuration_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., initialization, runtime) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES pio_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES peripheral_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_pio_id FOREIGN KEY ("pio_id") REFERENCES pio_ports ("pio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES peripheral_pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (planning, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "client_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the configuration (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES peripheral_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES peripheral_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
